name: The 'local_infile' database flag for a Cloud SQL Mysql instance is set to 'off'
query: { cloudSqlInstances( where: { engine: { eq: "mysql" } cloudProvider: { eq: "gcp" } OR: [ { dbFlags_NONE: { name: { eq: "local_infile" } } } { dbFlags_SOME: { name: { eq: "local_infile" }, value: { eq: "on" } } } ] } ) { ...AssetFragment }}
